title: StrictUnits Conversion Request
description: Input payload for converting one value from a source unit expression to a target unit expression.

value.description: Decimal-compatible value accepted by StrictUnits. Strings are recommended for precision.

from_unit.description: Source unit expression, such as 'miles' or 'm/s^2'.

to_unit.description: Target unit expression, such as 'km' or 'ft/s^2'.
